channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Watch Sabrina Carpenter and Stevie Nicks Perform ‘Landslide’ at the Met Gala
item.description: 🎶✨ When two queens collide! Sabrina Carpenter and Stevie Nicks slay ‘Landslide’ at the Met Gala. Watch now! #MusicRoyalty #MetGalaMagic 🎸👑

item.title: Tour news: Ninajirachi, Dolly Parton, Todd Terje, The Fleshtones, Northwest Hardcore Fest, Wailin Storms, more
item.description: 🚌 On the road again! 🎶 Exciting tour news featuring some of your faves like Dolly Parton and more! #MusicNews 🎉

item.title: Bring Me the Horizon’s Rise to Arena Headliner on Full Display at Madison Square Garden Show: Review, Photos + Video
item.description: 🔥 Rock on, Bring Me the Horizon! 🎸🤘 From club stages to MSG, they're taking over arenas! Check out the epic review, pics, and vid! #BMTH

item.title: Ninajirachi Plots 2026 North American Tour
item.description: 🚀 Ninajirachi is taking her beats across North America in 2026! Who's ready to dance the night away?! 💃🎶 #NinajirachiTour2026

item.title: Hayley Williams, Mitski, Ethel Cain Set for All Things Go Festival 2026
item.description: 🌟 Dream lineup alert! 🌟 Get ready for an epic music experience at All Things Go Festival 2026 with Hayley Williams, Mitski, and Ethel Cain! 🎶 #MusicFestivalGoals
